'''Juno''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Fregan]] who loyally worked as an assistant for the criminal syndicate ruled by the [[Cobral family]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]'' {{1st}}
